    Posts

    Posts

    CodeIgniter4: View Layouts and Custom 404 Page for Portfolio Project

    6 minute read

    Published: April 03, 2026

    Efficient page management is an important aspect of web application development, especially to keep the UI structure organized and maintainable in the long term. In this article, we practice page layouting using a static portfolio website case study and 404 customization.

    CodeIgniter4: Membuat Layout dan Kustom Halaman 404 pada Project Portofolio

    6 minute read

    Published: April 03, 2026

    Pengelolaan halaman yang efisien merupakan aspek penting dalam pengembangan aplikasi web, khususnya untuk menjaga struktur tampilan yang terorganisir dan memudahkan pengelolaan di masa mendatang. Pada artikel ini kita mempraktikkan layouting halaman menggunakan studi kasus web statis portofolio dan kustomisasi 404.

    CodeIgniter4: Initial Configuration and MVC Design Pattern

    6 minute read

    Published: March 20, 2026

    CodeIgniter provides a strong and flexible foundation for PHP web application development. In this article, we learn CI4 initial project configuration, command line usage, migration and seeder, database settings, routing, helper-library usage, and MVC (Model-View-Controller) implementation.

    CodeIgniter4: Konfigurasi Awal dan Pola Desain MVC

    5 minute read

    Published: March 20, 2026

    Framework CodeIgniter menyediakan kerangka dasar yang kuat dan fleksibel untuk pengembangan aplikasi web berbasis PHP. Pada artikel ini, kita mempelajari konfigurasi awal project CI4, penggunaan command line, migration dan seeder, pengaturan database, routing, pemanfaatan library-helper, serta implementasi pola MVC (Model-View-Controller).

    CodeIgniter4: First Project and Working with Git and GitHub

    6 minute read

    Published: March 13, 2026

    Git is a distributed version control system used to track changes in source code during software development. GitHub is a web-based Git repository hosting platform that allows developers to store, manage, and share their code.

    CodeIgniter4: Project Pertama dan Bekerja dengan Git dan GitHub

    5 minute read

    Published: March 13, 2026

    Git adalah sistem kontrol versi terdistribusi yang digunakan untuk melacak perubahan dalam kode sumber selama pengembangan perangkat lunak. GitHub adalah platform hosting repositori Git berbasis web yang memungkinkan pengembang untuk menyimpan, mengelola, dan berbagi kode mereka.

    CodeIgniter4: Introduction and Installation

    4 minute read

    Published: March 06, 2026

    CodeIgniter 4 is a PHP framework used for building web applications. This framework is lightweight, fast, and easy to learn. In this article, we will discuss the basics of web development using PHP 8, CodeIgniter 4, and how to set up a local development environment using XAMPP.

    CodeIgniter4: Pengenalan dan Instalasi

    4 minute read

    Published: March 06, 2026

    CodeIgniter 4 adalah sebuah framework PHP yang digunakan untuk membangun aplikasi web. Framework ini ringan, cepat, dan mudah dipelajari. Pada artikel ini kita akan membahas dasar-dasar pengembangan web dengan PHP 8, CodeIgniter 4, dan bagaimana cara melakukan instalasi lingkungan pengembangan di komputer lokal dengan XAMPP.

    portfolio

    Book Chapter: Dasar Pemrograman Web

    Published: July 24, 2024

    Book: Buku Ajar Pengembangan Aplikasi Web

    Published: October 28, 2024

    Book Chapter: Dasar-dasar Pemrograman Python

    Published: July 14, 2025

    publications

    Decision Support Systems for Land Suitability Evaluation on Rice Cultivation using ELECTRE Method

    Published in The 5th International Conference on Energy, Environmental and Information System (ICENIS 2020), 2020

    The result shows that the application of this method is quite effective for decision making so that alternatives are obtained that have the highest land use suitability compared to other alternatives for environmentally friendly rice cultivation.

    Recommended citation: I. Ali, V. Gunawan, and K. Adi. (2020). "Decision Support Systems for Land Suitability Evaluation on Rice Cultivation using ELECTRE Method." In The 5th International Conference on Energy, Environmental and Information System (ICENIS 2020).
    Download Paper

    Land-use suitability evaluation for organic rice cultivation using fuzzy-AHP ELECTRE method

    Published in Register: Jurnal Ilmiah Teknologi Sistem Informasi, 2021

    This study's results indicate that integrating the web with fuzzy-AHP ELECTRE is quite effectively applied for decision-making in organic farming.

    Recommended citation: I. Ali, V. Gunawan, and K. Adi. (2021). "Land-use suitability evaluation for organic rice cultivation using fuzzy-AHP ELECTRE method." Register: Jurnal Ilmiah Teknologi Sistem Informasi. 7(1).
    Download Paper

    Arduino Microcontroller-Based Automatic Irrigation System for Grape Cultivation

    Published in Journal of Artificial Intelligence and Engineering Applications (JAIEA), 2025

    The purpose of this research is to design an automatic irrigation system based on soil humidity levels for grapevines that is more adaptable and accurate to support grapevine cultivation in Indonesia's tropical climate.

    Recommended citation: Ali, I., Warisma, S., & Aljabar, A. (2025). "Arduino Microcontroller-Based Automatic Irrigation System for Grape Cultivation." Journal of Artificial Intelligence and Engineering Applications (JAIEA). 5(1).
    Download Paper

    IoT-Based Smart Fertigation System for Citrus Plants using Fuzzy Logic Control

    Published in Journal of Information Systems and Informatics, 2025

    Overall, the IoT–FLC integration provides a more adaptive and eco-efficient irrigation model that promotes sustainable management of water and nutrients in tropical citrus cultivation.

    Recommended citation: I. Ali, A. Adrinoviarini, O. A. Banaty, and M. I. Kamil. (2025). "IoT-Based Smart Fertigation System for Citrus Plants using Fuzzy Logic Control." Journal of Information Systems and Informatics. 7(4).
    Download Paper
